title: Human vs. Computer Capabilities
description: A Venn diagram illustrating the overlapping and distinct capabilities of humans and computers, highlighting the unique role of Human-Centred AI.
elements: Human Core Capabilities (e.g., Empathy, Creativity, Ethics)
Computer Core Capabilities (e.g., Speed, Storage, Accuracy)
Shared/Complementary Capabilities (e.g., Problem-Solving, Pattern Recognition, Language Processing)
relationships: Humans and computers have distinct, non-overlapping strengths
Human-Centred AI exists in the intersection, leveraging the complementary strengths of both
